Product: Home Remittances
Q: What is Home Remittance ?
A: Home Remittance Service enables remitters to send money from abroad to Pakistan instantly, conveniently, and safely through the legal banking channel.

Product: Home Remittances
Q: What types of Inward Home Remittance products does NUST Bank offer ?
A: NUST offers the following Home Remittance Products to cater to the needs of various home remittance
beneficiaries in Pakistan:
• Cash Over the Counter (CoC) payments for walk-in customers
• NUST Account Transfer
• Other Bank Account Transfer via Inter Bank Funds Transfer (IBFT) & Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS)

Product: Home Remittances
Q: In which currency will I receive my remittance?
A: All home remittance payments are disbursed in Pak Rupees.

Product: Home Remittances
Q: Is there any limit on the amount received though NUST Home Remittance?
A: Below are the applicable limits:
• NUST Accounts - No Limit
• Other banks accounts - No Limit
• Cash Over the Counter (CoC) Transactions - Up to PKR 1,000,000/- per transaction and there is no limit of Western Union COC transactions

Product: Home Remittances
Q: Are there any charges/fee for NUST's Home Remittance Service?
A: NUST Home Remittance Service is free of charge.

Product: Home Remittances
Q: Are there any tax deductions on Home Remittances?
A: Home Remittance Service is free of taxes.

Product: Home Remittances
Q: Can I receive remittance in Pakistan if I do not have a bank account with any bank?
A: You can receive your home remittance from any of NUST 600+ domestic branches nationwide if you have a valid CNIC and Transaction Unique Reference No. / Pin code.

Product: Funds Transfer / RAAST
Q: Is there a limit on the amount I can transfer through the mobile banking app?
A: Yes, 1 million is the current daily limit. Transfer limits vary based on your account type. Check the “Limits” section in the app for specifics on daily transfer limits.

Product: Funds Transfer / RAAST
Q: How can I change limit of funds transfer?
A: To change your funds, transfer limit, go to the “My profile” section and select “Manage Limit” in the app, then select “Change FT/IBFT” limits.

Product: Funds Transfer / RAAST
Q: How can I add or update beneficiaries/ recipients of mobile banking app for funds transfer?
A: In the app, navigate to the “Transfer Funds” section and select “New Beneficiaries.” Here, you can choose to add a new beneficiary by entering their details or update existing beneficiary information.

Product: Funds Transfer / RAAST
Q: How do I perform international transactions through mobile app?
A: One can enable international transactions by tapping on card management, select manage debit card and choose “international tranx activation” option.

Product: Funds Transfer / RAAST
Q: Does the app support contactless payments or digital wallets?
A: For contactless payments NUST Bank has a separate mobile app named as NUST Digital Wallets. Customers can download and perform payments.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: Can I use the mobile app while I am overseas?
A: Yes, the NUST mobile app can be accessed globally. Ensure you have internet connectivity and your registered mobile number is active for OTPs if required.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: What should I do if I forget my login password?
A: Tap on 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. Follow the steps to reset your password using your registered mobile number and verification details.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: Can I reset my MPIN through the app?
A: Yes, after logging into the app, go to 'Profile' → 'Change MPIN' and follow the prompts to reset your MPIN securely.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: What services are available under Bill Payment option?
A: You can pay utility bills, internet and mobile bills, and government fees using the 'Bill Payment' option in the app.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: How can I recharge mobile balance or buy top-up?
A: Use the 'Mobile Top-Up' feature. Select your network, enter the mobile number and amount, and confirm with your MPIN.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: Is biometric login supported in the app?
A: Yes, biometric login is supported. You can enable it under the 'Profile' section by turning on 'Fingerprint Login' for faster and secure access.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: Can I view my debit card details using the mobile app?
A: You can view basic card details like the card status and activation options. For full card info, please contact the bank for security reasons.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: How can I report an issue or give feedback within the app?
A: Go to the 'Contact Us' or 'Feedback' section in the app and submit your query or feedback. You can also email support@NUSTbank.com.pk.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: How can I deactivate or delete my mobile banking account?
A: For security reasons, deactivation or deletion requests must be submitted by calling the helpline at +92 (51) 111 000 494.

Product: App Features / Functionalities
Q: Is the mobile app available in multiple languages?
A: Currently, the NUST mobile app supports English only. Multilingual support is being considered for future updates.
